```typescriptreact
'use client'

import { useEffect, useState } from 'react'
import Link from 'next/link'

interface Article {
  id: string
  title: string
  summary: string
  source: string
  published_date: string
  credibility_score?: number
  verified_claims_count?: number
  region?: string
  verification_level?: 'fully' | 'partially' | 'unverified'
}

export default function Home() {
  const [articles, setArticles] = useState<Article[]>([])
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null)
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('climate')
  const [filterRegion, setFilterRegion] = useState('all')
  const [filterVerification, setFilterVerification] = useState('all')

  useEffect(() => {
    const fetchArticles = async () => {
      try {
        const apiUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL || 'http://localhost:5200'
        console.log('Fetching from:', `${apiUrl}/api/articles`)
        const response = await fetch(`${apiUrl}/api/articles?limit=50`)

        if (!response.ok) {
          throw new Error(`HTTP error! status: ${response.status}`)
        }

        const data = await response.json()
        console.log('API response:', data)
        
        // API returns array directly, not wrapped in {articles: [...]}
        const articlesArray = Array.isArray(data) ? data : (data.articles || [])
        
        // Map API response to frontend format
        const mappedArticles = articlesArray.map((article: any) => ({
          id: article.article_id || article.id,
          title: article.title,
          summary: article.excerpt || article.summary || article.extracted_text?.substring(0, 200) || '',
          source: article.source_name || article.source,
          published_date: article.published_date || article.published_at,
          credibility_score: article.reliability_score ? article.reliability_score / 100 : (article.credibility_score || 0),
          verified_claims_count: article.verified_claims_count || article.claim_count || 0,
          region: article.country_code || article.region || 'Global',
          verification_level: article.overall_credibility === 'high' ? 'fully' : 'partially'
        }))
        
        setArticles(mappedArticles)
        setError(null)
      } catch (err) {
        console.error('Failed to fetch articles:', err)
        setError('Could not connect to API. Showing demo data.')
        // Demo data matching the design
        setArticles([
          {
            id: '1',
            title: 'Arctic Permafrost Thawing Accelerates: New Data Shows 150 Billion Tons of Carbon at Risk',
            summary: 'Recent satellite data from NASA reveals that Arctic permafrost is thawing at unprecedented rates, potentially releasing massive amounts of methane and carbon dioxide into the atmosphere.',
            source: 'NASA',
            published_date: '2025-10-23T10:00:00Z',
            credibility_score: 0.95,
            verified_claims_count: 8,
            region: 'Arctic',
            verification_level: 'fully'
          },
          {
            id: '2',
            title: 'Solar Energy Costs Drop 89% Over Past Decade, Now Cheapest Power Source in History',
            summary: 'Analysis of global energy markets shows solar photovoltaic costs have fallen dramatically, making it the most cost-effective energy source in most regions. This shift is driving renewable energy adoption worldwide.',
            source: 'International Energy Agency',
            published_date: '2025-10-23T08:00:00Z',
            credibility_score: 0.92,
            verified_claims_count: 12,
            region: 'Global',
            verification_level: 'fully'
          },
          {
            id: '3',
            title: 'Ocean Acidification Threatens Marine Ecosystems: pH Levels Reach Critical Thresholds',
            summary: 'New research from NOAA indicates that ocean pH levels have dropped to levels not seen in millions of years, threatening coral reefs, shellfish populations, and the entire marine food chain.',
            source: 'NOAA',
            published_date: '2025-10-23T06:00:00Z',
            credibility_score: 0.88,
            verified_claims_count: 6,
            region: 'Pacific Ocean',
            verification_level: 'partially'
          },
          {
            id: '4',
            title: 'Reforestation Initiatives Show Promise: Amazon Recovery Exceeds Projections',
            summary: 'Satellite monitoring reveals that reforestation efforts in previously deforested Amazon regions are showing faster-than-expected recovery rates, with biodiversity indicators improving significantly.',
            source: 'Amazon Research Institute',
            published_date: '2025-10-22T14:00:00Z',
            credibility_score: 0.90,
            verified_claims_count: 7,
            region: 'South America',
            verification_level: 'fully'
          },
          {
            id: '5',
            title: 'Electric Vehicle Adoption Surges: 40% of New Car Sales in Norway Now Electric',
            summary: 'Norway continues to lead the global transition to electric vehicles, with new data showing EVs now represent the majority of new vehicle registrations, driven by policy incentives and infrastructure development.',
            source: 'Norwegian Road Federation',
            published_date: '2025-10-21T12:00:00Z',
            credibility_score: 0.94,
            verified_claims_count: 9,
            region: 'Europe',
            verification_level: 'fully'
          },
          {
            id: '6',
            title: 'Extreme Weather Events Increase 400% Since 1980: Climate Attribution Studies Confirm Link',
            summary: 'Comprehensive analysis of weather patterns over four decades reveals a dramatic increase in extreme weather events, with climate attribution science establishing clear links to anthropogenic climate change.',
            source: 'World Meteorological Organization',
            published_date: '2025-10-20T09:00:00Z',
            credibility_score: 0.96,
            verified_claims_count: 15,
            region: 'Global',
            verification_level: 'fully'
          }
        ])
      } finally {
        setLoading(false)
      }
    }

    fetchArticles()
  }, [])

  const getTimeSince = (dateString: string) => {
    const date = new Date(dateString)
    const now = new Date()
    const diffInHours = Math.floor((now.getTime() - date.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60))

    if (diffInHours < 1) return 'Just now'
    if (diffInHours < 24) return `${diffInHours} hours ago`
    const days = Math.floor(diffInHours / 24)
    if (days === 1) return '1 day ago'
    return `${days} days ago`
  }

  const filteredArticles = articles.filter((article) => {
    if (filterRegion !== 'all' && article.region !== filterRegion) return false
    if (filterVerification !== 'all' && article.verification_level !== filterVerification) return false
    return true
  })

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
      {/* Header */}
      <header className="bg-white border-b border-gray-200">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between h-16">
            <div className="flex items-center space-x-8">
              <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
                <div className="w-8 h-8 bg-clilens-primary rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">
                  <span className="text-white font-bold text-sm">C</span>
                </div>
                <span className="font-bold text-xl text-gray-900">CliLens.AI</span>
              </div>

              <nav className="hidden md:flex space-x-6">
                <button
                  onClick={() => setActiveTab('climate')}
                  className={`px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors ${
                    activeTab === 'climate'
                      ? 'text-gray-900 border-b-2 border-clilens-primary'
                      : 'text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900'
                  }`}
                >
                  Climate
                </button>
                <button
                  onClick={() => setActiveTab('about')}
                  className={`px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors ${
                    activeTab === 'about'
                      ? 'text-gray-900 border-b-2 border-clilens-primary'
                      : 'text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900'
                  }`}
                >
                  About
                </button>
                <button
                  onClick={() => setActiveTab('methodology')}
                  className={`px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors ${
                    activeTab === 'methodology'
                      ? 'text-gray-900 border-b-2 border-clilens-primary'
                      : 'text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900'
                  }`}
                >
                  Methodology
                </button>
              </nav>
            </div>

            <div className="flex items-center">
              <div className="relative">
                <input
                  type="text"
                  placeholder="Search topics..."
                  className="pl-10 pr-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-clilens-primary focus:border-transparent w-64"
                />
                <svg className="absolute left-3 top-2.5 h-5 w-5 text-gray-400" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                  <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M21 21l-6-6m2-5a7 7 0 11-14 0 7 7 0 0114 0z" />
                </svg>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </header>

      {/* Hero Section */}
      <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-clilens-teal-700 via-clilens-teal-600 to-clilens-teal-500 text-white">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-20 text-center">
          <div className="mb-4">
            <span className="inline-flex items-center px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-white/20 backdrop-blur-sm">
              <svg className="w-4 h-4 mr-1" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20">
                <path d="M9.049 2.927c.3-.921 1.603-.921 1.902 0l1.07 3.292a1 1 0 00.95.69h3.462c.969 0 1.371 1.24.588 1.81l-2.8 2.034a1 1 0 00-.364 1.118l1.07 3.292c.3.921-.755 1.688-1.54 1.118l-2.8-2.034a1 1 0 00-1.175 0l-2.8 2.034c-.784.57-1.838-.197-1.539-1.118l1.07-3.292a1 1 0 00-.364-1.118L2.98 8.72c-.783-.57-.38-1.81.588-1.81h3.461a1 1 0 00.951-.69l1.07-3.292z" />
              </svg>
              AI-Powered Fact Verification
            </span>
          </div>

          <h1 className="text-5xl font-bold mb-4">
            Climate Truth, <span className="text-clilens-teal-200">Verified by AI</span>
          </h1>

          <p className="text-xl text-clilens-teal-100 max-w-3xl mx-auto mb-8">
            Cut through the noise with fact-checked climate news synthesized from trusted sources.
            Every claim, every source, transparently verified.
          </p>

          <div className="flex items-center justify-center space-x-8 text-sm">
            <div className="flex items-center">
              <svg className="w-5 h-5 mr-2 text-clilens-teal-200" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20">
                <path fillRule="evenodd" d="M10 18a8 8 0 100-16 8 8 0 000 16zm3.707-9.293a1 1 0 00-1.414-1.414L9 10.586 7.707 9.293a1 1 0 00-1.414 1.414l2 2a1 1 0 001.414 0l4-4z" clipRule="evenodd" />
              </svg>
              Automated fact-checking
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center">
              <svg className="w-5 h-5 mr-2 text-clilens-teal-200" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20">
                <path fillRule="evenodd" d="M10 18a8 8 0 100-16 8 8 0 000 16zm3.707-9.293a1 1 0 00-1.414-1.414L9 10.586 7.707 9.293a1 1 0 00-1.414 1.414l2 2a1 1 0 001.414 0l4-4z" clipRule="evenodd" />
              </svg>
              Scientific sources only
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center">
              <svg className="w-5 h-5 mr-2 text-clilens-teal-200" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20">
                <path fillRule="evenodd" d="M10 18a8 8 0 100-16 8 8 0 000 16zm3.707-9.293a1 1 0 00-1.414-1.414L9 10.586 7.707 9.293a1 1 0 00-1.414 1.414l2 2a1 1 0 001.414 0l4-4z" clipRule="evenodd" />
              </svg>
              100% transparent
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Filters */}
      <div className="bg-white border-b border-gray-200">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-4">
          <div className="flex items-center space-x-4">
            <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 flex items-center">
              <svg className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M3 4a1 1 0 011-1h16a1 1 0 011 1v2.586a1 1 0 01-.293.707l-6.414 6.414a1 1 0 00-.293.707V17l-4 4v-6.586a1 1 0 00-.293-.707L3.293 7.293A1 1 0 013 6.586V4z" />
              </svg>
              Filter by:
            </span>

            <select
              value={filterRegion}
              onChange={(e) => setFilterRegion(e.target.value)}
              className="px-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-clilens-primary focus:border-transparent"
            >
              <option value="all">All Regions</option>
              <option value="Global">Global</option>
              <option value="Arctic">Arctic</option>
              <option value="Europe">Europe</option>
              <option value="South America">South America</option>
              <option value="Pacific Ocean">Pacific Ocean</option>
            </select>

            <select
              value={filterVerification}
              onChange={(e) => setFilterVerification(e.target.value)}
              className="px-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-clilens-primary focus:border-transparent"
            >
              <option value="all">Verification Level</option>
              <option value="fully">Fully Verified</option>
              <option value="partially">Partially Verified</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Main Content */}
      <main className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8">
        <div className="mb-6">
          <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">Latest Verified Reports</h2>
          <p className="text-gray-600 mt-1">All articles are fact-checked and verified using AI-powered analysis of scientific sources</p>
        </div>

        {loading ? (
          <div className="flex items-center justify-center py-12">
            <div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-12 w-12 border-b-2 border-clilens-primary"></div>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="grid gap-6 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3">
            {filteredArticles.map((article) => (
              <Link 
                key={article.id} 
                href={`/articles/${article.id}`}
                className="block bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow border border-gray-200 overflow-hidden"
              >
                <div className="p-6">
                  <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3">
                    <span className={`inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium ${
                      article.verification_level === 'fully'
                        ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-800'
                        : article.verification_level === 'partially'
                        ? 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800'
                        : 'bg-red-100 text-red-800'
                    }`}>
                      <svg className="w-3 h-3 mr-1" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20">
                        <path fillRule="evenodd" d="M6.267 3.455a3.066 3.066 0 001.745-.723 3.066 3.066 0 013.976 0 3.066 3.066 0 001.745.723 3.066 3.066 0 012.812 2.812c.051.643.304 1.254.723 1.745a3.066 3.066 0 010 3.976 3.066 3.066 0 00-.723 1.745 3.066 3.066 0 01-2.812 2.812 3.066 3.066 0 00-1.745.723 3.066 3.066 0 01-3.976 0 3.066 3.066 0 00-1.745-.723 3.066 3.066 0 01-2.812-2.812 3.066 3.066 0 00-.723-1.745 3.066 3.066 0 010-3.976 3.066 3.066 0 00.723-1.745 3.066 3.066 0 012.812-2.812zm7.44 5.252a1 1 0 00-1.414-1.414L9 10.586 7.707 9.293a1 1 0 00-1.414 1.414l2 2a1 1 0 001.414 0l4-4z" clipRule="evenodd" />
                      </svg>
                      {article.verification_level === 'fully' ? 'Fully Verified' : 'Partially Verified'}
                    </span>

                    {article.region && (
                      <span className="flex items-center text-xs text-gray-500">
                        <svg className="w-3 h-3 mr-1" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                          <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M17.657 16.657L13.414 20.9a1.998 1.998 0 01-2.827 0l-4.244-4.243a8 8 0 1111.314 0z" />
                          <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M15 11a3 3 0 11-6 0 3 3 0 016 0z" />
                        </svg>
                        {article.region}
                      </span>
                    )}
                  </div>

                  <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2 leading-tight">
                    {article.title}
                  </h3>

                  <p className="text-gray-600 text-sm mb-4 leading-relaxed line-clamp-3">
                    {article.summary}
                  </p>

                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between text-xs text-gray-500 pt-4 border-t border-gray-100">
                    <div className="flex items-center space-x-1">
                      <svg className="w-4 h-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                        <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M12 8v4l3 3m6-3a9 9 0 11-18 0 9 9 0 0118 0z" />
                      </svg>
                      <span>{getTimeSince(article.published_date)}</span>
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex items-center space-x-1 font-medium text-clilens-primary">
                      <span>{article.verified_claims_count} claims verified</span>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        )}

        {!loading && filteredArticles.length === 0 && (
          <div className="text-center py-12">
            <p className="text-gray-500">No articles match the selected filters.</p>
          </div>
        )}
      </main>

      {/* Footer */}
      <footer className="bg-white border-t border-gray-200 mt-16">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-12">
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-8">
            <div>
              <div className="flex items-center space-x-2 mb-4">
                <div className="w-8 h-8 bg-clilens-primary rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">
                  <span className="text-white font-bold text-sm">C</span>
                </div>
                <span className="font-bold text-xl text-gray-900">CliLens.AI</span>
              </div>
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
                Next-generation AI-powered fact-verified climate news platform.
              </p>
              <div className="flex items-center space-x-4 mt-4">
                <a href="#" className="text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600">
                  <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M8.29 20.251c7.547 0 11.675-6.253 11.675-11.675 0-.178 0-.355-.012-.53A8.348 8.348 0 0022 5.92a8.19 8.19 0 01-2.357.646 4.118 4.118 0 001.804-2.27 8.224 8.224 0 01-2.605.996 4.107 4.107 0 00-6.993 3.743 11.65 11.65 0 01-8.457-4.287 4.106 4.106 0 001.27 5.477A4.072 4.072 0 012.8 9.713v.052a4.105 4.105 0 003.292 4.022 4.095 4.095 0 01-1.853.07 4.108 4.108 0 003.834 2.85A8.233 8.233 0 012 18.407a11.616 11.616 0 006.29 1.84" /></svg>
                </a>
                <a href="#" className="text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600">
                  <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 0c-6.626 0-12 5.373-12 12 0 5.302 3.438 9.8 8.207 11.387.599.111.793-.261.793-.577v-2.234c-3.338.726-4.033-1.416-4.033-1.416-.546-1.387-1.333-1.756-1.333-1.756-1.089-.745.083-.729.083-.729 1.205.084 1.839 1.237 1.839 1.237 1.07 1.834 2.807 1.304 3.492.997.107-.775.418-1.305.762-1.604-2.665-.305-5.467-1.334-5.467-5.931 0-1.311.469-2.381 1.236-3.221-.124-.303-.535-1.524.117-3.176 0 0 1.008-.322 3.301 1.23.957-.266 1.983-.399 3.003-.404 1.02.005 2.047.138 3.006.404 2.291-1.552 3.297-1.23 3.297-1.23.653 1.653.242 2.874.118 3.176.77.84 1.235 1.911 1.235 3.221 0 4.609-2.807 5.624-5.479 5.921.43.372.823 1.102.823 2.222v3.293c0 .319.192.694.801.576 4.765-1.589 8.199-6.086 8.199-11.386 0-6.627-5.373-12-12-12z" /></svg>
                </a>
                <a href="#" className="text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600">
                  <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M20.447 20.452h-3.554v-5.569c0-1.328-.027-3.037-1.852-3.037-1.853 0-2.136 1.445-2.136 2.939v5.667H9.351V9h3.414v1.561h.046c.477-.9 1.637-1.85 3.37-1.85 3.601 0 4.267 2.37 4.267 5.455v6.286zM5.337 7.433c-1.144 0-2.063-.926-2.063-2.065 0-1.138.92-2.063 2.063-2.063 1.14 0 2.064.925 2.064 2.063 0 1.139-.925 2.065-2.064 2.065zm1.782 13.019H3.555V9h3.564v11.452zM22.225 0H1.771C.792 0 0 .774 0 1.729v20.542C0 23.227.792 24 1.771 24h20.451C23.2 24 24 23.227 24 22.271V1.729C24 .774 23.2 0 22.222 0h.003z" /></svg>
                </a>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div>
              <h3 className="font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-4">Platform</h3>
              <ul className="space-y-2 text-sm text-gray-600">
                <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-clilens-primary">How it works</a></li>
                <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-clilens-primary">Methodology</a></li>
                <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-clilens-primary">Data sources</a></li>
                <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-clilens-primary">API access</a></li>
              </ul>
            </div>

            <div>
              <h3 className="font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-4">Resources</h3>
              <ul className="space-y-2 text-sm text-gray-600">
                <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-clilens-primary">About us</a></li>
                <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-clilens-primary">Blog</a></li>
                <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-clilens-primary">Press kit</a></li>
                <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-clilens-primary">Contact</a></li>
              </ul>
            </div>

            <div>
              <h3 className="font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-4">Legal</h3>
              <ul className="space-y-2 text-sm text-gray-600">
                <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-clilens-primary">Privacy policy</a></li>
                <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-clilens-primary">Terms of service</a></li>
                <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-clilens-primary">Cookie policy</a></li>
              </ul>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="mt-8 pt-8 border-t border-gray-200 text-center text-sm text-gray-500">
            <p>&copy; 2025 CliLens.AI. Powered by Multi-Agent AI System.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </footer>
    </div>
  )
}

```

Updating the API endpoint to use the v2 route:


```typescriptreact
'use client'

import { useEffect, useState } from 'react'
import Link from 'next/link'

interface Article {
  id: string
  title: string
  summary: string
  source: string
  published_date: string
  credibility_score?: number
  verified_claims_count?: number
  region?: string
  verification_level?: 'fully' | 'partially' | 'unverified'
}

export default function Home() {
  const [articles, setArticles] = useState<Article[]>([])
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null)
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('climate')
  const [filterRegion, setFilterRegion] = useState('all')
  const [filterVerification, setFilterVerification] = useState('all')

  useEffect(() => {
    const fetchArticles = async () => {
      try {
        const apiUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL || 'http://localhost:5200'
        console.log('Fetching from:', `${apiUrl}/api/v2/articles`)
        const response = await fetch(`${apiUrl}/api/v2/articles?limit=50`)

        if (!response.ok) {
          throw new Error(`HTTP error! status: ${response.status}`)
        }

        const data = await response.json()
        console.log('API response:', data)
        
        // API returns array directly, not wrapped in {articles: [...]}
        const articlesArray = Array.isArray(data) ? data : (data.articles || [])
        
        // Map API response to frontend format
        const mappedArticles = articlesArray.map((article: any) => ({
          id: article.article_id || article.id,
          title: article.title,
          summary: article.excerpt || article.summary || article.extracted_text?.substring(0, 200) || '',
          source: article.source_name || article.source,
          published_date: article.published_date || article.published_at,
          credibility_score: article.reliability_score ? article.reliability_score / 100 : (article.credibility_score || 0),
          verified_claims_count: article.verified_claims_count || article.claim_count || 0,
          region: article.country_code || article.region || 'Global',
          verification_level: article.overall_credibility === 'high' ? 'fully' : 'partially'
        }))
        
        setArticles(mappedArticles)
        setError(null)
      } catch (err) {
        console.error('Failed to fetch articles:', err)
        setError('Could not connect to API. Showing demo data.')
        // Demo data matching the design
        setArticles([
          {
            id: '1',
            title: 'Arctic Permafrost Thawing Accelerates: New Data Shows 150 Billion Tons of Carbon at Risk',
            summary: 'Recent satellite data from NASA reveals that Arctic permafrost is thawing at unprecedented rates, potentially releasing massive amounts of methane and carbon dioxide into the atmosphere.',
            source: 'NASA',
            published_date: '2025-10-23T10:00:00Z',
            credibility_score: 0.95,
            verified_claims_count: 8,
            region: 'Arctic',
            verification_level: 'fully'
          },
          {
            id: '2',
            title: 'Solar Energy Costs Drop 89% Over Past Decade, Now Cheapest Power Source in History',
            summary: 'Analysis of global energy markets shows solar photovoltaic costs have fallen dramatically, making it the most cost-effective energy source in most regions. This shift is driving renewable energy adoption worldwide.',
            source: 'International Energy Agency',
            published_date: '2025-10-23T08:00:00Z',
            credibility_score: 0.92,
            verified_claims_count: 12,
            region: 'Global',
            verification_level: 'fully'
          },
          {
            id: '3',
            title: 'Ocean Acidification Threatens Marine Ecosystems: pH Levels Reach Critical Thresholds',
            summary: 'New research from NOAA indicates that ocean pH levels have dropped to levels not seen in millions of years, threatening coral reefs, shellfish populations, and the entire marine food chain.',
            source: 'NOAA',
            published_date: '2025-10-23T06:00:00Z',
            credibility_score: 0.88,
            verified_claims_count: 6,
            region: 'Pacific Ocean',
            verification_level: 'partially'
          },
          {
            id: '4',
            title: 'Reforestation Initiatives Show Promise: Amazon Recovery Exceeds Projections',
            summary: 'Satellite monitoring reveals that reforestation efforts in previously deforested Amazon regions are showing faster-than-expected recovery rates, with biodiversity indicators improving significantly.',
            source: 'Amazon Research Institute',
            published_date: '2025-10-22T14:00:00Z',
            credibility_score: 0.90,
            verified_claims_count: 7,
            region: 'South America',
            verification_level: 'fully'
          },
          {
            id: '5',
            title: 'Electric Vehicle Adoption Surges: 40% of New Car Sales in Norway Now Electric',
            summary: 'Norway continues to lead the global transition to electric vehicles, with new data showing EVs now represent the majority of new vehicle registrations, driven by policy incentives and infrastructure development.',
            source: 'Norwegian Road Federation',
            published_date: '2025-10-21T12:00:00Z',
            credibility_score: 0.94,
            verified_claims_count: 9,
            region: 'Europe',
            verification_level: 'fully'
          },
          {
            id: '6',
            title: 'Extreme Weather Events Increase 400% Since 1980: Climate Attribution Studies Confirm Link',
            summary: 'Comprehensive analysis of weather patterns over four decades reveals a dramatic increase in extreme weather events, with climate attribution science establishing clear links to anthropogenic climate change.',
            source: 'World Meteorological Organization',
            published_date: '2025-10-20T09:00:00Z',
            credibility_score: 0.96,
            verified_claims_count: 15,
            region: 'Global',
            verification_level: 'fully'
          }
        ])
      } finally {
        setLoading(false)
      }
    }

    fetchArticles()
  }, [])

  const getTimeSince = (dateString: string) => {
    const date = new Date(dateString)
    const now = new Date()
    const diffInHours = Math.floor((now.getTime() - date.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60))

    if (diffInHours < 1) return 'Just now'
    if (diffInHours < 24) return `${diffInHours} hours ago`
    const days = Math.floor(diffInHours / 24)
    if (days === 1) return '1 day ago'
    return `${days} days ago`
  }

  const filteredArticles = articles.filter((article) => {
    if (filterRegion !== 'all' && article.region !== filterRegion) return false
    if (filterVerification !== 'all' && article.verification_level !== filterVerification) return false
    return true
  })

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
      {/* Header */}
      <header className="bg-white border-b border-gray-200">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between h-16">
            <div className="flex items-center space-x-8">
              <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
                <div className="w-8 h-8 bg-clilens-primary rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">
                  <span className="text-white font-bold text-sm">C</span>
                </div>
                <span className="font-bold text-xl text-gray-900">CliLens.AI</span>
              </div>

              <nav className="hidden md:flex space-x-6">
                <button
                  onClick={() => setActiveTab('climate')}
                  className={`px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors ${
                    activeTab === 'climate'
                      ? 'text-gray-900 border-b-2 border-clilens-primary'
                      : 'text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900'
                  }`}
                >
                  Climate
                </button>
                <button
                  onClick={() => setActiveTab('about')}
                  className={`px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors ${
                    activeTab === 'about'
                      ? 'text-gray-900 border-b-2 border-clilens-primary'
                      : 'text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900'
                  }`}
                >
                  About
                </button>
                <button
                  onClick={() => setActiveTab('methodology')}
                  className={`px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors ${
                    activeTab === 'methodology'
                      ? 'text-gray-900 border-b-2 border-clilens-primary'
                      : 'text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900'
                  }`}
                >
                  Methodology
                </button>
              </nav>
            </div>

            <div className="flex items-center">
              <div className="relative">
                <input
                  type="text"
                  placeholder="Search topics..."
                  className="pl-10 pr-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-clilens-primary focus:border-transparent w-64"
                />
                <svg className="absolute left-3 top-2.5 h-5 w-5 text-gray-400" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                  <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M21 21l-6-6m2-5a7 7 0 11-14 0 7 7 0 0114 0z" />
                </svg>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </header>

      {/* Hero Section */}
      <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-clilens-teal-700 via-clilens-teal-600 to-clilens-teal-500 text-white">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-20 text-center">
          <div className="mb-4">
            <span className="inline-flex items-center px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-white/20 backdrop-blur-sm">
              <svg className="w-4 h-4 mr-1" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20">
                <path d="M9.049 2.927c.3-.921 1.603-.921 1.902 0l1.07 3.292a1 1 0 00.95.69h3.462c.969 0 1.371 1.24.588 1.81l-2.8 2.034a1 1 0 00-.364 1.118l1.07 3.292c.3.921-.755 1.688-1.54 1.118l-2.8-2.034a1 1 0 00-1.175 0l-2.8 2.034c-.784.57-1.838-.197-1.539-1.118l1.07-3.292a1 1 0 00-.364-1.118L2.98 8.72c-.783-.57-.38-1.81.588-1.81h3.461a1 1 0 00.951-.69l1.07-3.292z" />
              </svg>
              AI-Powered Fact Verification
            </span>
          </div>

          <h1 className="text-5xl font-bold mb-4">
            Climate Truth, <span className="text-clilens-teal-200">Verified by AI</span>
          </h1>

          <p className="text-xl text-clilens-teal-100 max-w-3xl mx-auto mb-8">
            Cut through the noise with fact-checked climate news synthesized from trusted sources.
            Every claim, every source, transparently verified.
          </p>

          <div className="flex items-center justify-center space-x-8 text-sm">
            <div className="flex items-center">
              <svg className="w-5 h-5 mr-2 text-clilens-teal-200" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20">
                <path fillRule="evenodd" d="M10 18a8 8 0 100-16 8 8 0 000 16zm3.707-9.293a1 1 0 00-1.414-1.414L9 10.586 7.707 9.293a1 1 0 00-1.414 1.414l2 2a1 1 0 001.414 0l4-4z" clipRule="evenodd" />
              </svg>
              Automated fact-checking
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center">
              <svg className="w-5 h-5 mr-2 text-clilens-teal-200" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20">
                <path fillRule="evenodd" d="M10 18a8 8 0 100-16 8 8 0 000 16zm3.707-9.293a1 1 0 00-1.414-1.414L9 10.586 7.707 9.293a1 1 0 00-1.414 1.414l2 2a1 1 0 001.414 0l4-4z" clipRule="evenodd" />
              </svg>
              Scientific sources only
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center">
              <svg className="w-5 h-5 mr-2 text-clilens-teal-200" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20">
                <path fillRule="evenodd" d="M10 18a8 8 0 100-16 8 8 0 000 16zm3.707-9.293a1 1 0 00-1.414-1.414L9 10.586 7.707 9.293a1 1 0 00-1.414 1.414l2 2a1 1 0 001.414 0l4-4z" clipRule="evenodd" />
              </svg>
              100% transparent
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Filters */}
      <div className="bg-white border-b border-gray-200">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-4">
          <div className="flex items-center space-x-4">
            <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 flex items-center">
              <svg className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M3 4a1 1 0 011-1h16a1 1 0 011 1v2.586a1 1 0 01-.293.707l-6.414 6.414a1 1 0 00-.293.707V17l-4 4v-6.586a1 1 0 00-.293-.707L3.293 7.293A1 1 0 013 6.586V4z" />
              </svg>
              Filter by:
            </span>

            <select
              value={filterRegion}
              onChange={(e) => setFilterRegion(e.target.value)}
              className="px-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-clilens-primary focus:border-transparent"
            >
              <option value="all">All Regions</option>
              <option value="Global">Global</option>
              <option value="Arctic">Arctic</option>
              <option value="Europe">Europe</option>
              <option value="South America">South America</option>
              <option value="Pacific Ocean">Pacific Ocean</option>
            </select>

            <select
              value={filterVerification}
              onChange={(e) => setFilterVerification(e.target.value)}
              className="px-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-clilens-primary focus:border-transparent"
            >
              <option value="all">Verification Level</option>
              <option value="fully">Fully Verified</option>
              <option value="partially">Partially Verified</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Main Content */}
      <main className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8">
        <div className="mb-6">
          <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">Latest Verified Reports</h2>
          <p className="text-gray-600 mt-1">All articles are fact-checked and verified using AI-powered analysis of scientific sources</p>
        </div>

        {loading ? (
          <div className="flex items-center justify-center py-12">
            <div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-12 w-12 border-b-2 border-clilens-primary"></div>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="grid gap-6 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3">
            {filteredArticles.map((article) => (
              <Link 
                key={article.id} 
                href={`/articles/${article.id}`}
                className="block bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow border border-gray-200 overflow-hidden"
              >
                <div className="p-6">
                  <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3">
                    <span className={`inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium ${
                      article.verification_level === 'fully'
                        ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-800'
                        : article.verification_level === 'partially'
                        ? 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800'
                        : 'bg-red-100 text-red-800'
                    }`}>
                      <svg className="w-3 h-3 mr-1" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20">
                        <path fillRule="evenodd" d="M6.267 3.455a3.066 3.066 0 001.745-.723 3.066 3.066 0 013.976 0 3.066 3.066 0 001.745.723 3.066 3.066 0 012.812 2.812c.051.643.304 1.254.723 1.745a3.066 3.066 0 010 3.976 3.066 3.066 0 00-.723 1.745 3.066 3.066 0 01-2.812 2.812 3.066 3.066 0 00-1.745.723 3.066 3.066 0 01-3.976 0 3.066 3.066 0 00-1.745-.723 3.066 3.066 0 01-2.812-2.812 3.066 3.066 0 00-.723-1.745 3.066 3.066 0 010-3.976 3.066 3.066 0 00.723-1.745 3.066 3.066 0 012.812-2.812zm7.44 5.252a1 1 0 00-1.414-1.414L9 10.586 7.707 9.293a1 1 0 00-1.414 1.414l2 2a1 1 0 001.414 0l4-4z" clipRule="evenodd" />
                      </svg>
                      {article.verification_level === 'fully' ? 'Fully Verified' : 'Partially Verified'}
                    </span>

                    {article.region && (
                      <span className="flex items-center text-xs text-gray-500">
                        <svg className="w-3 h-3 mr-1" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                          <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M17.657 16.657L13.414 20.9a1.998 1.998 0 01-2.827 0l-4.244-4.243a8 8 0 1111.314 0z" />
                          <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M15 11a3 3 0 11-6 0 3 3 0 016 0z" />
                        </svg>
                        {article.region}
                      </span>
                    )}
                  </div>

                  <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2 leading-tight">
                    {article.title}
                  </h3>

                  <p className="text-gray-600 text-sm mb-4 leading-relaxed line-clamp-3">
                    {article.summary}
                  </p>

                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between text-xs text-gray-500 pt-4 border-t border-gray-100">
                    <div className="flex items-center space-x-1">
                      <svg className="w-4 h-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                        <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M12 8v4l3 3m6-3a9 9 0 11-18 0 9 9 0 0118 0z" />
                      </svg>
                      <span>{getTimeSince(article.published_date)}</span>
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex items-center space-x-1 font-medium text-clilens-primary">
                      <span>{article.verified_claims_count} claims verified</span>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        )}

        {!loading && filteredArticles.length === 0 && (
          <div className="text-center py-12">
            <p className="text-gray-500">No articles match the selected filters.</p>
          </div>
        )}
      </main>

      {/* Footer */}
      <footer className="bg-white border-t border-gray-200 mt-16">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-12">
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-8">
            <div>
              <div className="flex items-center space-x-2 mb-4">
                <div className="w-8 h-8 bg-clilens-primary rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">
                  <span className="text-white font-bold text-sm">C</span>
                </div>
                <span className="font-bold text-xl text-gray-900">CliLens.AI</span>
              </div>
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
                Next-generation AI-powered fact-verified climate news platform.
              </p>
              <div className="flex items-center space-x-4 mt-4">
                <a href="#" className="text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600">
                  <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M8.29 20.251c7.547 0 11.675-6.253 11.675-11.675 0-.178 0-.355-.012-.53A8.348 8.348 0 0022 5.92a8.19 8.19 0 01-2.357.646 4.118 4.118 0 001.804-2.27 8.224 8.224 0 01-2.605.996 4.107 4.107 0 00-6.993 3.743 11.65 11.65 0 01-8.457-4.287 4.106 4.106 0 001.27 5.477A4.072 4.072 0 012.8 9.713v.052a4.105 4.105 0 003.292 4.022 4.095 4.095 0 01-1.853.07 4.108 4.108 0 003.834 2.85A8.233 8.233 0 012 18.407a11.616 11.616 0 006.29 1.84" /></svg>
                </a>
                <a href="#" className="text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600">
                  <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 0c-6.626 0-12 5.373-12 12 0 5.302 3.438 9.8 8.207 11.387.599.111.793-.261.793-.577v-2.234c-3.338.726-4.033-1.416-4.033-1.416-.546-1.387-1.333-1.756-1.333-1.756-1.089-.745.083-.729.083-.729 1.205.084 1.839 1.237 1.839 1.237 1.07 1.834 2.807 1.304 3.492.997.107-.775.418-1.305.762-1.604-2.665-.305-5.467-1.334-5.467-5.931 0-1.311.469-2.381 1.236-3.221-.124-.303-.535-1.524.117-3.176 0 0 1.008-.322 3.301 1.23.957-.266 1.983-.399 3.003-.404 1.02.005 2.047.138 3.006.404 2.291-1.552 3.297-1.23 3.297-1.23.653 1.653.242 2.874.118 3.176.77.84 1.235 1.911 1.235 3.221 0 4.609-2.807 5.624-5.479 5.921.43.372.823 1.102.823 2.222v3.293c0 .319.192.694.801.576 4.765-1.589 8.199-6.086 8.199-11.386 0-6.627-5.373-12-12-12z" /></svg>
                </a>
                <a href="#" className="text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600">
                  <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M20.447 20.452h-3.554v-5.569c0-1.328-.027-3.037-1.852-3.037-1.853 0-2.136 1.445-2.136 2.939v5.667H9.351V9h3.414v1.561h.046c.477-.9 1.637-1.85 3.37-1.85 3.601 0 4.267 2.37 4.267 5.455v6.286zM5.337 7.433c-1.144 0-2.063-.926-2.063-2.065 0-1.138.92-2.063 2.063-2.063 1.14 0 2.064.925 2.064 2.063 0 1.139-.925 2.065-2.064 2.065zm1.782 13.019H3.555V9h3.564v11.452zM22.225 0H1.771C.792 0 0 .774 0 1.729v20.542C0 23.227.792 24 1.771 24h20.451C23.2 24 24 23.227 24 22.271V1.729C24 .774 23.2 0 22.222 0h.003z" /></svg>
                </a>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div>
              <h3 className="font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-4">Platform</h3>
              <ul className="space-y-2 text-sm text-gray-600">
                <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-clilens-primary">How it works</a></li>
                <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-clilens-primary">Methodology</a></li>
                <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-clilens-primary">Data sources</a></li>
                <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-clilens-primary">API access</a></li>
              </ul>
            </div>

            <div>
              <h3 className="font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-4">Resources</h3>
              <ul className="space-y-2 text-sm text-gray-600">
                <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-clilens-primary">About us</a></li>
                <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-clilens-primary">Blog</a></li>
                <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-clilens-primary">Press kit</a></li>
                <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-clilens-primary">Contact</a></li>
              </ul>
            </div>

            <div>
              <h3 className="font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-4">Legal</h3>
              <ul className="space-y-2 text-sm text-gray-600">
                <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-clilens-primary">Privacy policy</a></li>
                <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-clilens-primary">Terms of service</a></li>
                <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-clilens-primary">Cookie policy</a></li>
              </ul>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="mt-8 pt-8 border-t border-gray-200 text-center text-sm text-gray-500">
            <p>&copy; 2025 CliLens.AI. Powered by Multi-Agent AI System.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </footer>
    </div>
  )
}

```

Found the issue: a missing closing tag. Checking and fixing it:


Checking the Link component structure:


The `Link` component is missing a closing tag. Adding it:


```typescriptreact
'use client'

import { useEffect, useState } from 'react'
import Link from 'next/link'

interface Article {
  id: string
  title: string
  summary: string
  source: string
  published_date: string
  credibility_score?: number
  verified_claims_count?: number
  region?: string
  verification_level?: 'fully' | 'partially' | 'unverified'
}

export default function Home() {
  const [articles, setArticles] = useState<Article[]>([])
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null)
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('climate')
  const [filterRegion, setFilterRegion] = useState('all')
  const [filterVerification, setFilterVerification] = useState('all')

  useEffect(() => {
    const fetchArticles = async () => {
      try {
        const apiUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL || 'http://localhost:5200'
        console.log('Fetching from:', `${apiUrl}/api/v2/articles`)
        const response = await fetch(`${apiUrl}/api/v2/articles?limit=50`)

        if (!response.ok) {
          throw new Error(`HTTP error! status: ${response.status}`)
        }

        const data = await response.json()
        console.log('API response:', data)
        
        // API returns array directly, not wrapped in {articles: [...]}
        const articlesArray = Array.isArray(data) ? data : (data.articles || [])
        
        // Map API response to frontend format
        const mappedArticles = articlesArray.map((article: any) => ({
          id: article.article_id || article.id,
          title: article.title,
          summary: article.excerpt || article.summary || article.extracted_text?.substring(0, 200) || '',
          source: article.source_name || article.source,
          published_date: article.published_date || article.published_at,
          credibility_score: article.reliability_score ? article.reliability_score / 100 : (article.credibility_score || 0),
          verified_claims_count: article.verified_claims_count || article.claim_count || 0,
          region: article.country_code || article.region || 'Global',
          verification_level: article.overall_credibility === 'high' ? 'fully' : 'partially'
        }))
        
        setArticles(mappedArticles)
        setError(null)
      } catch (err) {
        console.error('Failed to fetch articles:', err)
        setError('Could not connect to API. Showing demo data.')
        // Demo data matching the design
        setArticles([
          {
            id: '1',
            title: 'Arctic Permafrost Thawing Accelerates: New Data Shows 150 Billion Tons of Carbon at Risk',
            summary: 'Recent satellite data from NASA reveals that Arctic permafrost is thawing at unprecedented rates, potentially releasing massive amounts of methane and carbon dioxide into the atmosphere.',
            source: 'NASA',
            published_date: '2025-10-23T10:00:00Z',
            credibility_score: 0.95,
            verified_claims_count: 8,
            region: 'Arctic',
            verification_level: 'fully'
          },
          {
            id: '2',
            title: 'Solar Energy Costs Drop 89% Over Past Decade, Now Cheapest Power Source in History',
            summary: 'Analysis of global energy markets shows solar photovoltaic costs have fallen dramatically, making it the most cost-effective energy source in most regions. This shift is driving renewable energy adoption worldwide.',
            source: 'International Energy Agency',
            published_date: '2025-10-23T08:00:00Z',
            credibility_score: 0.92,
            verified_claims_count: 12,
            region: 'Global',
            verification_level: 'fully'
          },
          {
            id: '3',
            title: 'Ocean Acidification Threatens Marine Ecosystems: pH Levels Reach Critical Thresholds',
            summary: 'New research from NOAA indicates that ocean pH levels have dropped to levels not seen in millions of years, threatening coral reefs, shellfish populations, and the entire marine food chain.',
            source: 'NOAA',
            published_date: '2025-10-23T06:00:00Z',
            credibility_score: 0.88,
            verified_claims_count: 6,
            region: 'Pacific Ocean',
            verification_level: 'partially'
          },
          {
            id: '4',
            title: 'Reforestation Initiatives Show Promise: Amazon Recovery Exceeds Projections',
            summary: 'Satellite monitoring reveals that reforestation efforts in previously deforested Amazon regions are showing faster-than-expected recovery rates, with biodiversity indicators improving significantly.',
            source: 'Amazon Research Institute',
            published_date: '2025-10-22T14:00:00Z',
            credibility_score: 0.90,
            verified_claims_count: 7,
            region: 'South America',
            verification_level: 'fully'
          },
          {
            id: '5',
            title: 'Electric Vehicle Adoption Surges: 40% of New Car Sales in Norway Now Electric',
            summary: 'Norway continues to lead the global transition to electric vehicles, with new data showing EVs now represent the majority of new vehicle registrations, driven by policy incentives and infrastructure development.',
            source: 'Norwegian Road Federation',
            published_date: '2025-10-21T12:00:00Z',
            credibility_score: 0.94,
            verified_claims_count: 9,
            region: 'Europe',
            verification_level: 'fully'
          },
          {
            id: '6',
            title: 'Extreme Weather Events Increase 400% Since 1980: Climate Attribution Studies Confirm Link',
            summary: 'Comprehensive analysis of weather patterns over four decades reveals a dramatic increase in extreme weather events, with climate attribution science establishing clear links to anthropogenic climate change.',
            source: 'World Meteorological Organization',
            published_date: '2025-10-20T09:00:00Z',
            credibility_score: 0.96,
            verified_claims_count: 15,
            region: 'Global',
            verification_level: 'fully'
          }
        ])
      } finally {
        setLoading(false)
      }
    }

    fetchArticles()
  }, [])

  const getTimeSince = (dateString: string) => {
    const date = new Date(dateString)
    const now = new Date()
    const diffInHours = Math.floor((now.getTime() - date.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60))

    if (diffInHours < 1) return 'Just now'
    if (diffInHours < 24) return `${diffInHours} hours ago`
    const days = Math.floor(diffInHours / 24)
    if (days === 1) return '1 day ago'
    return `${days} days ago`
  }

  const filteredArticles = articles.filter((article) => {
    if (filterRegion !== 'all' && article.region !== filterRegion) return false
    if (filterVerification !== 'all' && article.verification_level !== filterVerification) return false
    return true
  })

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
      {/* Header */}
      <header className="bg-white border-b border-gray-200">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between h-16">
            <div className="flex items-center space-x-8">
              <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
                <div className="w-8 h-8 bg-clilens-primary rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">
                  <span className="text-white font-bold text-sm">C</span>
                </div>
                <span className="font-bold text-xl text-gray-900">CliLens.AI</span>
              </div>

              <nav className="hidden md:flex space-x-6">
                <button
                  onClick={() => setActiveTab('climate')}
                  className={`px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors ${
                    activeTab === 'climate'
                      ? 'text-gray-900 border-b-2 border-clilens-primary'
                      : 'text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900'
                  }`}
                >
                  Climate
                </button>
                <button
                  onClick={() => setActiveTab('about')}
                  className={`px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors ${
                    activeTab === 'about'
                      ? 'text-gray-900 border-b-2 border-clilens-primary'
                      : 'text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900'
                  }`}
                >
                  About
                </button>
                <button
                  onClick={() => setActiveTab('methodology')}
                  className={`px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors ${
                    activeTab === 'methodology'
                      ? 'text-gray-900 border-b-2 border-clilens-primary'
                      : 'text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900'
                  }`}
                >
                  Methodology
                </button>
              </nav>
            </div>

            <div className="flex items-center">
              <div className="relative">
                <input
                  type="text"
                  placeholder="Search topics..."
                  className="pl-10 pr-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-clilens-primary focus:border-transparent w-64"
                />
                <svg className="absolute left-3 top-2.5 h-5 w-5 text-gray-400" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                  <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M21 21l-6-6m2-5a7 7 0 11-14 0 7 7 0 0114 0z" />
                </svg>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </header>

      {/* Hero Section */}
      <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-clilens-teal-700 via-clilens-teal-600 to-clilens-teal-500 text-white">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-20 text-center">
          <div className="mb-4">
            <span className="inline-flex items-center px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-white/20 backdrop-blur-sm">
              <svg className="w-4 h-4 mr-1" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20">
                <path d="M9.049 2.927c.3-.921 1.603-.921 1.902 0l1.07 3.292a1 1 0 00.95.69h3.462c.969 0 1.371 1.24.588 1.81l-2.8 2.034a1 1 0 00-.364 1.118l1.07 3.292c.3.921-.755 1.688-1.54 1.118l-2.8-2.034a1 1 0 00-1.175 0l-2.8 2.034c-.784.57-1.838-.197-1.539-1.118l1.07-3.292a1 1 0 00-.364-1.118L2.98 8.72c-.783-.57-.38-1.81.588-1.81h3.461a1 1 0 00.951-.69l1.07-3.292z" />
              </svg>
              AI-Powered Fact Verification
            </span>
          </div>

          <h1 className="text-5xl font-bold mb-4">
            Climate Truth, <span className="text-clilens-teal-200">Verified by AI</span>
          </h1>

          <p className="text-xl text-clilens-teal-100 max-w-3xl mx-auto mb-8">
            Cut through the noise with fact-checked climate news synthesized from trusted sources.
            Every claim, every source, transparently verified.
          </p>

          <div className="flex items-center justify-center space-x-8 text-sm">
            <div className="flex items-center">
              <svg className="w-5 h-5 mr-2 text-clilens-teal-200" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20">
                <path fillRule="evenodd" d="M10 18a8 8 0 100-16 8 8 0 000 16zm3.707-9.293a1 1 0 00-1.414-1.414L9 10.586 7.707 9.293a1 1 0 00-1.414 1.414l2 2a1 1 0 001.414 0l4-4z" clipRule="evenodd" />
              </svg>
              Automated fact-checking
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center">
              <svg className="w-5 h-5 mr-2 text-clilens-teal-200" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20">
                <path fillRule="evenodd" d="M10 18a8 8 0 100-16 8 8 0 000 16zm3.707-9.293a1 1 0 00-1.414-1.414L9 10.586 7.707 9.293a1 1 0 00-1.414 1.414l2 2a1 1 0 001.414 0l4-4z" clipRule="evenodd" />
              </svg>
              Scientific sources only
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center">
              <svg className="w-5 h-5 mr-2 text-clilens-teal-200" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20">
                <path fillRule="evenodd" d="M10 18a8 8 0 100-16 8 8 0 000 16zm3.707-9.293a1 1 0 00-1.414-1.414L9 10.586 7.707 9.293a1 1 0 00-1.414 1.414l2 2a1 1 0 001.414 0l4-4z" clipRule="evenodd" />
              </svg>
              100% transparent
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Filters */}
      <div className="bg-white border-b border-gray-200">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-4">
          <div className="flex items-center space-x-4">
            <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 flex items-center">
              <svg className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M3 4a1 1 0 011-1h16a1 1 0 011 1v2.586a1 1 0 01-.293.707l-6.414 6.414a1 1 0 00-.293.707V17l-4 4v-6.586a1 1 0 00-.293-.707L3.293 7.293A1 1 0 013 6.586V4z" />
              </svg>
              Filter by:
            </span>

            <select
              value={filterRegion}
              onChange={(e) => setFilterRegion(e.target.value)}
              className="px-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-clilens-primary focus:border-transparent"
            >
              <option value="all">All Regions</option>
              <option value="Global">Global</option>
              <option value="Arctic">Arctic</option>
              <option value="Europe">Europe</option>
              <option value="South America">South America</option>
              <option value="Pacific Ocean">Pacific Ocean</option>
            </select>

            <select
              value={filterVerification}
              onChange={(e) => setFilterVerification(e.target.value)}
              className="px-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-clilens-primary focus:border-transparent"
            >
              <option value="all">Verification Level</option>
              <option value="fully">Fully Verified</option>
              <option value="partially">Partially Verified</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Main Content */}
      <main className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8">
        <div className="mb-6">
          <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">Latest Verified Reports</h2>
          <p className="text-gray-600 mt-1">All articles are fact-checked and verified using AI-powered analysis of scientific sources</p>
        </div>

        {loading ? (
          <div className="flex items-center justify-center py-12">
            <div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-12 w-12 border-b-2 border-clilens-primary"></div>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="grid gap-6 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3">
            {filteredArticles.map((article) => (
              <Link 
                key={article.id} 
                href={`/articles/${article.id}`}
                className="block bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow border border-gray-200 overflow-hidden"
              >
                <div className="p-6">
                  <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3">
                    <span className={`inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium ${
                      article.verification_level === 'fully'
                        ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-800'
                        : article.verification_level === 'partially'
                        ? 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800'
                        : 'bg-red-100 text-red-800'
                    }`}>
                      <svg className="w-3 h-3 mr-1" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20">
                        <path fillRule="evenodd" d="M6.267 3.455a3.066 3.066 0 001.745-.723 3.066 3.066 0 013.976 0 3.066 3.066 0 001.745.723 3.066 3.066 0 012.812 2.812c.051.643.304 1.254.723 1.745a3.066 3.066 0 010 3.976 3.066 3.066 0 00-.723 1.745 3.066 3.066 0 01-2.812 2.812 3.066 3.066 0 00-1.745.723 3.066 3.066 0 01-3.976 0 3.066 3.066 0 00-1.745-.723 3.066 3.066 0 01-2.812-2.812 3.066 3.066 0 00-.723-1.745 3.066 3.066 0 010-3.976 3.066 3.066 0 00.723-1.745 3.066 3.066 0 012.812-2.812zm7.44 5.252a1 1 0 00-1.414-1.414L9 10.586 7.707 9.293a1 1 0 00-1.414 1.414l2 2a1 1 0 001.414 0l4-4z" clipRule="evenodd" />
                      </svg>
                      {article.verification_level === 'fully' ? 'Fully Verified' : 'Partially Verified'}
                    </span>

                    {article.region && (
                      <span className="flex items-center text-xs text-gray-500">
                        <svg className="w-3 h-3 mr-1" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                          <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M17.657 16.657L13.414 20.9a1.998 1.998 0 01-2.827 0l-4.244-4.243a8 8 0 1111.314 0z" />
                          <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M15 11a3 3 0 11-6 0 3 3 0 016 0z" />
                        </svg>
                        {article.region}
                      </span>
                    )}
                  </div>

                  <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2 leading-tight">
                    {article.title}
                  </h3>

                  <p className="text-gray-600 text-sm mb-4 leading-relaxed line-clamp-3">
                    {article.summary}
                  </p>

                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between text-xs text-gray-500 pt-4 border-t border-gray-100">
                    <div className="flex items-center space-x-1">
                      <svg className="w-4 h-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                        <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M12 8v4l3 3m6-3a9 9 0 11-18 0 9 9 0 0118 0z" />
                      </svg>
                      <span>{getTimeSince(article.published_date)}</span>
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex items-center space-x-1 font-medium text-clilens-primary">
                      <span>{article.verified_claims_count} claims verified</span>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </Link>
            ))}
          </div>
        )}

        {!loading && filteredArticles.length === 0 && (
          <div className="text-center py-12">
            <p className="text-gray-500">No articles match the selected filters.</p>
          </div>
        )}
      </main>

      {/* Footer */}
      <footer className="bg-white border-t border-gray-200 mt-16">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-12">
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-8">
            <div>
              <div className="flex items-center space-x-2 mb-4">
                <div className="w-8 h-8 bg-clilens-primary rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">
                  <span className="text-white font-bold text-sm">C</span>
                </div>
                <span className="font-bold text-xl text-gray-900">CliLens.AI</span>
              </div>
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
                Next-generation AI-powered fact-verified climate news platform.
              </p>
              <div className="flex items-center space-x-4 mt-4">
                <a href="#" className="text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600">
                  <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M8.29 20.251c7.547 0 11.675-6.253 11.675-11.675 0-.178 0-.355-.012-.53A8.348 8.348 0 0022 5.92a8.19 8.19 0 01-2.357.646 4.118 4.118 0 001.804-2.27 8.224 8.224 0 01-2.605.996 4.107 4.107 0 00-6.993 3.743 11.65 11.65 0 01-8.457-4.287 4.106 4.106 0 001.27 5.477A4.072 4.072 0 012.8 9.713v.052a4.105 4.105 0 003.292 4.022 4.095 4.095 0 01-1.853.07 4.108 4.108 0 003.834 2.85A8.233 8.233 0 012 18.407a11.616 11.616 0 006.29 1.84" /></svg>
                </a>
                <a href="#" className="text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600">
                  <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 0c-6.626 0-12 5.373-12 12 0 5.302 3.438 9.8 8.207 11.387.599.111.793-.261.793-.577v-2.234c-3.338.726-4.033-1.416-4.033-1.416-.546-1.387-1.333-1.756-1.333-1.756-1.089-.745.083-.729.083-.729 1.205.084 1.839 1.237 1.839 1.237 1.07 1.834 2.807 1.304 3.492.997.107-.775.418-1.305.762-1.604-2.665-.305-5.467-1.334-5.467-5.931 0-1.311.469-2.381 1.236-3.221-.124-.303-.535-1.524.117-3.176 0 0 1.008-.322 3.301 1.23.957-.266 1.983-.399 3.003-.404 1.02.005 2.047.138 3.006.404 2.291-1.552 3.297-1.23 3.297-1.23.653 1.653.242 2.874.118 3.176.77.84 1.235 1.911 1.235 3.221 0 4.609-2.807 5.624-5.479 5.921.43.372.823 1.102.823 2.222v3.293c0 .319.192.694.801.576 4.765-1.589 8.199-6.086 8.199-11.386 0-6.627-5.373-12-12-12z" /></svg>
                </a>
                <a href="#" className="text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600">
                  <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M20.447 20.452h-3.554v-5.569c0-1.328-.027-3.037-1.852-3.037-1.853 0-2.136 1.445-2.136 2.939v5.667H9.351V9h3.414v1.561h.046c.477-.9 1.637-1.85 3.37-1.85 3.601 0 4.267 2.37 4.267 5.455v6.286zM5.337 7.433c-1.144 0-2.063-.926-2.063-2.065 0-1.138.92-2.063 2.063-2.063 1.14 0 2.064.925 2.064 2.063 0 1.139-.925 2.065-2.064 2.065zm1.782 13.019H3.555V9h3.564v11.452zM22.225 0H1.771C.792 0 0 .774 0 1.729v20.542C0 23.227.792 24 1.771 24h20.451C23.2 24 24 23.227 24 22.271V1.729C24 .774 23.2 0 22.222 0h.003z" /></svg>
                </a>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div>
              <h3 className="font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-4">Platform</h3>
              <ul className="space-y-2 text-sm text-gray-600">
                <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-clilens-primary">How it works</a></li>
                <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-clilens-primary">Methodology</a></li>
                <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-clilens-primary">Data sources</a></li>
                <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-clilens-primary">API access</a></li>
              </ul>
            </div>

            <div>
              <h3 className="font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-4">Resources</h3>
              <ul className="space-y-2 text-sm text-gray-600">
                <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-clilens-primary">About us</a></li>
                <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-clilens-primary">Blog</a></li>
                <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-clilens-primary">Press kit</a></li>
                <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-clilens-primary">Contact</a></li>
              </ul>
            </div>

            <div>
              <h3 className="font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-4">Legal</h3>
              <ul className="space-y-2 text-sm text-gray-600">
                <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-clilens-primary">Privacy policy</a></li>
                <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-clilens-primary">Terms of service</a></li>
                <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-clilens-primary">Cookie policy</a></li>
              </ul>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="mt-8 pt-8 border-t border-gray-200 text-center text-sm text-gray-500">
            <p>&copy; 2025 CliLens.AI. Powered by Multi-Agent AI System.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </footer>
    </div>
  )
}

```

Fixed the syntax error: the `Link` component was missing a closing tag. The frontend should now compile correctly. The dev server should automatically pick up the changes.

## Fixed issues

1. Missing closing `</Link>` tag — added at line 366
2. Updated API endpoint — changed from `/api/articles` to `/api/v2/articles`
3. Cleared `.next` build cache — removed to force a fresh build

The platform should now be accessible at:
- Frontend: http://localhost:3000
- API: http://localhost:5200

The dev server should automatically reload. If you still see errors, wait a few seconds for the rebuild to complete. The page should now load with articles from the API.
